heading: Administration of leased lands
label: 315m–2 Administration of leased lands
text: The lands leased under sections 315m–1 to 315m–4 of this title shall be administered under the provisions of the Act of (), as amended (), commonly known as the Taylor Grazing Act.June 28, 1934June 26, 193648 Stat. 126949 Stat. 1976
notes: References in TextAct of (), as amended (), referred to in text, is , , known as the Taylor Grazing Act, which is classified principally to this subchapter (§ 315 et seq.). For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.June 28, 1934June 26, 193648 Stat. 126949 Stat. 1976act June 28, 1934, ch. 86548 Stat. 1269section 315 of this title
